bookingPending.failedText: We could not confirm your payment within a minute. If the funds were taken, your booking is safe — contact us and we will send you a link to choose your time: joanna@lettinggozenstudio.com

body.intro: Physical therapies supporting health, regeneration, and body vitality.

products.desc: Biorezonas 1:1 is a painless session where your body, like a bat, emits a frequency and the bioresonance system reads what is on its path. It is a way of looking for the cause of disharmony in the body.
products.pdfNote: Body scan + PDF report after the session
products.pdfDelivery: Body scan + PDF report sent after the session by email or WhatsApp.
includes: Spinal reactions to changes in the body
whoFor: People looking for the cause of disharmony in the body
products.warning: Disclaimer: Biorezonas 1:1 is a painless session where your body, like a bat, emits a frequency and the bioresonance system reads what is on its path. I always recommend seeing a doctor after such a test to analyse the indications and decide on appropriate medical tests. I do not recommend stopping medication or taking action without medical consultation when choosing treatment. I believe that caring for your health is a priority for a long life.

products.desc: Body scan — analysis of possible burdens. A 1:1 session in the studio or online.

Support for body and mind work
products.warning: Disclaimer: A Biofeedback session is an analysis of possible burdens and does not replace a medical diagnosis. Clients should always consult all actions with a doctor.

whoFor: People after physical or energetic overload

products.warning: Disclaimer: This session is supportive in nature and does not replace a medical diagnosis. Clients should always consult all actions with a doctor.

products.desc: Pressotherapy is a type of lymphatic massage that uses controlled air pressure. Aromatherapy and Hz music therapy are also used during the session.
includes: A special suit divided into chambers working in a specific sequence and with different pressure levels
Gentle, rhythmic pressure moving along the body
Support in removing excess fluids and toxins from the body
products.warning: Disclaimer: Pressotherapy is contraindicated in cases of thrombosis, pregnancy, and acute inflammatory conditions. Clients should always consult all actions with a doctor.

mindPage.intro: Energy analysis and subconscious work for mental clarity, emotional transformation, and inner balance.

mind-1.name: Hipnoterapia — Sesja 1:1
mind-1.desc: "There are no questions without answers..." I do not use a classic hypnosis formula — I use my gift to guide you through the hidden spaces of your subconscious. Includes a free 15-minute introductory consultation.
includes: The session structure is agreed individually after a conversation
whoFor: People looking for answers around questions and fears
mind-1.warning: Sessions are part of our privacy — what is spoken and experienced can change the way you see and feel the world.

mind-2.name: Konsultacja Energetyczna
mind-2.desc: An individual consultation focused on your energetic field. Blockage analysis and support in restoring energetic balance.

mind-3.name: Alchemik — Sesja 1:1
mind-3.desc: A session combining analysis with emotional clarity, goal setting, and discovering your potential. Work with the subconscious, NLP, and energy. Available 1:1 or online.
includes: A path to discovering your potential

mind-4.name: Alchemik — Pakiet 5 sesji
mind-4.desc: A package of 5 Alchemik sessions, 30 minutes each. Deep transformation through analysis of emotions, goals, and inner potential.

aboutPage.label: ABOUT ME
bioParagraphs: Welcome to my world — Letting Go Zen Studio. My name is Joanna Witkowska. I am a happy mother and a fulfilled woman who has experienced trauma and loss in the past.

I compare myself to the Alchemist — someone who experiences life, follows their dreams, learns from mistakes, and believes in the power of destiny. Someone open to new experiences in order to find their own formula of strength. I know that each of us is curious to discover our own treasure.

I could list my completed schools, studies, and training here, feeding my Ego and showing off diplomas on the wall. But my inner voice tells me clearly: I am here, Here and Now, to share knowledge with you and support you as best I can — from heart to heart.

My perspective has been shaped, among other things, by working in palliative care and with people affected by dementia. That is where I understood how precious time is, and how great a loss it is to suppress emotions and give up on your own dreams.

Letting Go Zen Studio is an Academy of Energy Alchemy — a bridge between science and energy that is waiting for you. I help you bring out your strength and release negative emotions through various workshops, classes, and therapies. It is a space where I combine science, spirituality, and body work.
supportItems: Therapeutic sessions & NLP — transformation of limiting thought patterns.
Hypnotherapy & Subconscious Work — reaching the source of your inner strength.
Mindfulness — returning to presence and calm in the here and now.
Quantum Physics, Metaphysics and Esotericism — discovering the deeper laws of the universe and energy.
Energy Alchemy, Chinese Medicine, Wellness — biofeedback and holistic care for your body's wellbeing.
aboutPage.methodParagraph: Each of these methods is based on proven techniques and my own personal life experience. I do not divide people by religion or beliefs — I respect our shared beginning and end, and I simply want to bring out the purest essence from life.
aboutPage.alchemikDescription: Sessions combining analysis with defining emotions, goals, and the path to discovering your potential. Available 1:1 or online.
closingParagraphs: I believe that each of us carries the potential of the Alchemist — the power to heal ourselves and find true happiness.
Since you are here, it means that nothing happens without a reason.
I invite you into a shared, extraordinary journey deep within yourself.

soul.intro: PDF reports, Ayurveda sessions, and destiny matrix analysis. Discover your spiritual mission, gifts, and inner direction.

soul1.desc: 3D Aura Scan + Energy Consultation + Kamarton Sound Therapy. A full overview of your energetic state with a practical action plan.
includes: Full overview of the energetic state
soul1.warning: This session is complementary and does not replace medical diagnosis.

soul2.desc: A detailed report based on your date, time, and place of birth. Cosmogram analysis — your unique psychological and personal profile. PDF report, 20–48 pages.
soul2.pdfNote: PDF in English, delivered within 7 days
includes: Personality and temperament: main character traits, strengths, and potential challenges
Relationships and love: relationship dynamics, emotional needs, and style of building closeness
Career and vocation: professional potential, talents, and paths that may bring fulfilment
Finances and wellbeing: your approach to money, resources, and material security
Family and home: early-life influences, close relationships, and the meaning of the home environment
Personal growth: areas where you can develop, improve, and expand
soul2.warning: The report is delivered only in English within 7 days of purchase.

soul3.desc: A 1:1 studio session. 3D aura photo and detailed analysis of the energetic state of the 7 chakras. You receive a printed colour aura photo.
whoFor: People curious about their energetic state

wspolpraca.label: COLLABORATION AND PROTOCOL
wspolpraca.intro: Before you book a session — please read how our collaboration works.
wspolpraca.studioText: In my studio, I help support balance across Mind · Body · Soul. I do not diagnose or treat medical conditions — I analyse potential energetic burdens and the impact of stress on the body and mind. I work with quantum, hydrogen and hypnotherapy-based techniques. Every client is treated individually, based on an initial conversation and questionnaire.
wspolpraca.importantTextOne: I do not recommend medical treatment, stopping medication, or replacing traditional medicine. Any health-related decisions should always be discussed with a qualified doctor.
wspolpraca.importantTextTwo: I care for the client's wellbeing in accordance with GDPR Article 13 and GDPR Article 14.
wspolpraca.bookingText: Later, we will connect the real Calendly link or embedded booking calendar here.

terms.label: ONLINE SHOP TERMS AND CONDITIONS
terms.intro: These terms set out the rules for using the Letting Go Zen Studio online shop, purchasing digital products, educational materials, online courses and processing payments.

seller.title: §1. Seller Information
seller.content: The online shop is operated by Letting Go Zen Studio, 42 Leslie Road, Aberdeen AB24 4EF, Scotland, United Kingdom. The business operates as a self-employed business. Contact: lettinggozenstudio@gmail.com.

definitions.title: §2. Definitions
definitions.content: Customer means a natural or legal person making a purchase through the shop. Shop means the Letting Go Zen Studio online service. Digital Product means content delivered electronically, including e-books, PDF files, audio meditations, relaxation recordings, hypnosis recordings, online courses and training materials. Service means online or in-person sessions offered by Letting Go Zen Studio.

scope.title: §3. Scope of Activity
scope.content: The shop allows the purchase of digital products, educational materials, audio recordings, online courses, wellness services, hypnotherapy sessions, EFT sessions, individual consultations, bioresonance sessions and biofeedback sessions.

orders.title: §4. Placing Orders
orders.content: Orders may be placed 24 hours a day. The Customer is required to provide truthful information. Placing an order means accepting these Terms and Conditions. The contract is concluded once payment confirmation is received.

prices.title: §5. Prices and Payments
prices.content: All prices are shown in GBP (£) or another currency displayed on the website. Payments are processed by the payment providers shown on the website. The Seller reserves the right to change prices, but changes do not apply to orders that have already been paid.

delivery.title: §6. Delivery of Digital Products
delivery.content: Digital products are delivered electronically. Delivery takes place through a download link, email message or user account in the service. Access to the product is granted after payment has been processed.

withdrawal.title: §7. Right of Withdrawal
withdrawal.content: For digital products, the Customer agrees to the delivery of digital content beginning before the withdrawal period expires and acknowledges that, after gaining access to the product, they lose the right to withdraw from the contract to the extent permitted by applicable law.

complaints.title: §8. Complaints
complaints.content: The Customer has the right to submit a complaint concerning a defective file, inability to download a product or technical errors. Complaints should be submitted electronically. Complaints will be reviewed within 14 days.

copyright.title: §9. Intellectual Property
copyright.content: All materials available in the shop are protected by copyright. Copying, distributing, publishing, reselling or sharing them with third parties without prior written consent from the copyright owner is prohibited.

liability.title: §10. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: Materials offered by Letting Go Zen Studio are educational, informational, relaxation-based and intended to support personal development. They do not constitute medical diagnosis, medical advice, psychotherapy or treatment of illness. Use of the materials is at the user's own responsibility.

sessions.title: §11. Sessions and Consultations
sessions.content: The Customer is required to provide truthful information about their health condition. Letting Go Zen Studio may refuse to provide a service if it considers the service inappropriate or potentially unsafe for the Customer. No specific therapeutic or personal development results are guaranteed.

data.title: §12. Personal Data Protection
data.content: Personal data is processed in accordance with the Privacy Policy and applicable UK GDPR and GDPR regulations.

final.title: §13. Final Provisions
final.content: These Terms and Conditions are governed by the law applicable in the United Kingdom. For customers from European Union countries, mandatory consumer protection provisions applicable in the customer's place of residence may also apply. Disputes will first be resolved amicably.

digitalConsent.title: Mandatory consent when purchasing a PDF or course
digitalConsent.terms: I have read and accepted the Online Shop Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
digitalConsent.instantDelivery: I agree to the immediate delivery of digital content and acknowledge that, after gaining access to the product, I lose the right to withdraw from the contract to the extent permitted by applicable law.

consent.label: CONSCIOUS CONSENT CLAUSE
consent.intro: Before starting a session, the client confirms that they understand the nature of the service, participate voluntarily and provide truthful health-related information.
consent.confirmationTitle: Before starting a session, the client confirms that:

points.nature: they understand the nature of the service.
points.notMedical: they understand that the service is not medical treatment.
points.truthfulHealth: they have provided truthful health-related information.
points.stopAnytime: they may stop the session at any time.
points.dataProcessing: they consent to the processing of data connected with the provision of the service.

consent.serviceDisclaimer: Notice: Services offered by Letting Go Zen Studio are intended to support wellbeing, relaxation and personal development. They do not constitute medical diagnosis or treatment of illness. If you have health concerns, please consult a doctor or another qualified professional.

privacy.label: PRIVACY POLICY
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy explains what personal data may be processed by Letting Go Zen Studio, why it is used and what rights users have under UK GDPR and GDPR.

controller.title: 1. Data Controller
controller.content: The data controller is Letting Go Zen Studio, 42 Leslie Road, Aberdeen AB24 4EF, Scotland, United Kingdom. Contact: lettinggozenstudio@gmail.com.

collectedData.title: 2. What Data We Collect
collectedData.content: We may process your full name, email address, phone number, payment data, information submitted through contact forms and information included in pre-session questionnaires.

specialCategoryData.title: 3. Special Category Data
specialCategoryData.content: In the case of hypnotherapy, EFT and bioresonance, information relating to the client's health and wellbeing may be processed. This data is processed only with the client's explicit consent.

purposes.title: 4. Purposes of Processing
purposes.content: Data is processed to provide services, contact clients, maintain session documentation, fulfil tax and accounting obligations and protect the legal interests of the business.

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis
legalBasis.content: Processing is based on the consent of the data subject, performance of a contract, the legitimate interests of the controller and legal obligations arising from tax regulations.

retention.title: 6. Data Retention
retention.content: Data is stored only for the period necessary to fulfil the purpose for which it was collected. Accounting documentation is stored in accordance with applicable UK law.

sharing.title: 7. Data Sharing
sharing.content: Data may be shared with service providers supporting the business, such as payment operators, hosting providers, email providers and accounting services. Data is not sold to third parties.

rights.title: 8. User Rights
rights.content: Users have the right to access their data, rectify their data, erase their data, restrict processing, transfer their data, withdraw consent and lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority. In the United Kingdom, the supervisory authority is the Information Commissioner's Office (ICO).

cookies.title: 9. Cookies
cookies.content: The website uses cookies to ensure proper website operation, analyse traffic and improve service quality. Users can change cookie settings in their browser.

serviceTerms.label: SERVICE TERMS AND CONDITIONS
serviceTerms.intro: These terms explain the rules for using services offered by Letting Go Zen Studio, including online and in-person sessions, bookings, payments, appointment cancellations, contraindications and client responsibility.

provider.title: 1. Service Provider Information
provider.content: The service provider is Letting Go Zen Studio, 42 Leslie Road, Aberdeen AB24 4EF, Scotland, United Kingdom. The business operates as a self-employed business. Contact: lettinggozenstudio@gmail.com.

scope.title: 2. Scope of Services
scope.content: Letting Go Zen Studio provides services in the field of hypnotherapy, EFT, wellness consultations, relaxation sessions, massage and manual therapies, bioresonance, biofeedback, workshops and training, online sales, and online or in-person consultations.

nature.title: 3. Nature of Services
nature.content: All services are intended to support wellbeing, personal development, relaxation and education. Services offered by Letting Go Zen Studio do not constitute medical services, do not replace medical diagnosis, do not replace psychiatric, psychological or pharmacological treatment, and do not guarantee specific results. The Customer remains responsible for their own health and treatment decisions.

booking.title: 4. Bookings and Payments
booking.content: Session bookings may be made through the website, by email, by phone or through other available communication channels. Payment may be made online, by bank transfer or through other methods indicated during booking. A session is confirmed after payment is received or according to individual arrangements.

cancellation.title: 5. Appointment Cancellation
cancellation.content: The Customer may cancel an appointment free of charge up to 24 hours before the scheduled time. In the event of later cancellation or failure to attend, the fee may be non-refundable. In exceptional situations, the Service Provider may offer to reschedule the appointment.

contraindications.title: 6. Contraindications
contraindications.content: The Customer is required to disclose all relevant health issues. This particularly includes epilepsy, mental illness, schizophrenia, psychosis, severe neurological disorders and pregnancy in the case of certain therapies. The Service Provider may refuse to provide a service if it considers the service inappropriate or potentially unsafe.

liability.title: 7. Liability
liability.content: The Customer uses the services voluntarily and at their own responsibility. Letting Go Zen Studio is not responsible for decisions made by the Customer after a session, failure to achieve expected results or the consequences of withholding health information.

copyright.title: 8. Copyright
copyright.content: All materials published on the website are protected by copyright. Copying, distributing or using materials without the owner's consent is prohibited.
